headline: Best Buy's RGB TV push Is catching fire, Jefferies says
summary: Best Buy Co Inc (NYSE:BBY)'s early bet on RGB TV is starting to pay off, Jefferies says, pointing to rising site traffic and social media buzz as signs the retailer is building consumer awareness of the emerging technology. headline: Domino's adds 2 board members, elects new lead independent director
summary: Michael Creedon, CEO of Dollar Tree, and Anneliese Olson of HP Inc. will both join the Domino's audit committee
